attacking_style: Shows willingness to bridge to breakaways and launch solo moves from distance (17.6km out). Demonstrates aggressive racing instincts with opportunistic attacks when reading tactical situations.
team_tactics: EF appears to rely on Rutsch's individual initiative rather than concentrated team support. Lacks numerical advantage setup in key breakaway scenarios, suggesting he operates with limited domestique support.
terrain_preference: Capable in varied terrain that allows breakaway moves. Specific climbing/sprint preferences unclear from available data, but shows endurance for sustained efforts.
vulnerability: Exposed when team lacks numerical strength in decisive breakaways. Cannot sustain winning efforts without teammate support in finale, even when positioned well.
key_patterns: Active in breakaway formations, both bridging and initiating moves (2 races)
Attacks from significant distance rather than waiting for sprint finishes (17.6km solo)
Strong tactical reading ability to identify breakaway opportunities (2 instances)
Limited by lack of team numerical advantage in decisive moments (noted weakness)
form_trajectory: unknown: insufficient recent data and too wide time gap (2021-2022) to assess current trajectory
